历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 2442 → 2798 → 1623 → 3041 → 1378. In 2023, there was a significant advance to 1623rd place, followed by a drop to 3041st in 2024, and then a major advance to 1378th in 2025, showing overall large fluctuations. The 2025 baseline is about 1378th, the best level in the past five years. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plans were 104 in 2021, 102 in 2022, 100 in 2023, 100 in 2024, and 100 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 127 students, a 27% increase compared to 2025, a significant expansion that will alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 19th in 2021 → 18th in 2022 → 16th in 2023 → 14th in 2024 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026, consistently in the national Top 20, with rising rankings in recent years, indicating a very high university level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (5 events, 3 negative, 1 positive, 1 neutral), involving teacher ethics and school management incidents (e.g., Gong Lin incident), which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with above-average short video exposure and moderate attention. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 12 disciplines were rated A- or above: Control Science and Engineering A+, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Mechanics A-, Mathematics A-, Physics A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Business Administration A-. There are 2 A+ disciplines (Control Science and Engineering, Information and Communication Engineering), indicating top-tier academic strength, which strongly attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous major categories at BIT are consistently hot/highly recommended. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 172,468 in 2025, intensifying competition. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing (a first-tier city), which has strong regional appeal to Shaanxi candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Shaanxi accounts for a small proportion, making it a cross-provincial enrollment with no significant local protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1378th, a significant 27% enrollment expansion in 2026 (shifting ranking back by about 223 places), a 19.7% increase in local physics category candidates (intensifying competition), and the university's very high level with continuously rising rankings (enhancing appeal), the expansion and candidate increase effects largely offset each other. The university's top-tier level supports the ranking, so no additional correction is made. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 1601st, with a range of 1409–1793.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 1601st, with a range of 1409–1793. Candidates with rankings within 1409 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Excellence Class, Future Precision Engineering Technology, Xu Teli Talent Class). Those with rankings between 1409 and 1601 are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Information Science and Technology, Electronic Information Experimental Class), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates with rankings between 1601 and 1793 are advised to mainly target Tier 3 majors (Aerospace and Mechanical-Electrical, Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class), with attempts at Tier 2. Candidates with rankings beyond 1793 should apply cautiously, using Tier 3 as a safety option.

The 2026 plan is 15, a 25% increase compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science University Rankings, it consistently ranks among the top 20 nationally (14th in 2026), indicating a very high university level. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics. Its popularity on Douyin is relatively high (ranked 47th). No significant gaps in admission cutoffs have been observed. Beijing Institute of Technology is known for its strengths in science and engineering, with only the Social Sciences Experimental Class (including law, social work, foreign languages, etc.) recruiting in the liberal arts category. In relevant discipline evaluations, law has not been independently rated, business administration is rated A-, management science and engineering is rated A, indicating relatively average strength in liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.text: Law-related majors are socially popular (recommended), while foreign language majors are generally neutral.
